since_last: 34% of 101 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.33%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.89% · BTC -1.35% · Gold +1.32% · Nasdaq100 +1.93%. 34% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.33%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.33%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.97%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +11.89%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +11.89%, CHKP +3.10%, DELL +2.67%, CCJ +1.92%, DV +1.68%. Laggards: SKHY -6.85%, TER -4.94%, GEV -4.69%, NXPI -4.67%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.71% at $122.66
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.71% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
